scripts.build: npm run build -w @specdriven/shared && npm run build -w @specdriven/api && npm run build -w @specdriven/web-client && npm run build -w @specdriven/web-staff
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @specdriven/shared && npm run typecheck -w @specdriven/api && npm run typecheck -w @specdriven/web-client && npm run typecheck -w @specdriven/web-staff
